member.name: M:Website.Models.EncriptDecript.GeneratePassword(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a pseudo-random password containing the number of character classes defined by complexity, where 2 = alpha, 3 = alpha+num, 4 = alpha+num+special.
